Off Calendar Jun-26-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff The Frontenac, LP is present. Represented by Lucky Stewart.
Attorney David Wasserman for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jason Stafford is present.
Attorney Kimberly Shindel appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Michelle Brant, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of JUL-01-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
